description: Discover the perfect solution for freelance artists and designers looking to showcase their creative portfolio. This email template is ideal for those in the realm of software and technology, business services, and marketing & design. With its sleek design and contemporary color palette of grey, light pink, and bold red against a clean white backdrop, it provides a professional and striking framework for your work. It's perfect for sharing your latest graphics, illustrations, and photography projects, promoting your services, or updating your blog. This template is also tailored for computer and internet-based freelancers, making it easy to connect with potential clients in the digital space. Elevate your freelance business with this dynamic and customizable email template.
short_description: Showcase your creative portfolio with this professional email template. Ideal for freelance artists and designers in software, technology and marketing fields. Features a sleek design with a contemporary color palette, perfect for displaying graphics, illustrations and photography projects. Connect with potential clients digitally. Elevate your freelance business today.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.

Hi! I am Hericsson Joe. 

 I'm a Ui Designer, Illustrator & Typographer based in Tromsø. 

Building beautiful e functional design.
